commit.message:
refactor: extract inline styles to CSS classes per code review

- Add .gs-topbar-select for currency select styling
- Add .gs-search-icon-btns and .gs-search-icon-btn for search inner buttons
- Add .gs-action-user-icon for header user icon sizing
- Add .badge-ranking for gold-themed ranking product badges
- Add .gs-cat-link--featured and .gs-cat-sidebar-item--featured for highlighted nav items
- Add .gs-footer-logo for footer brand name
- Add .gs-section--alt for alternate background sections
- Add .gs-footer-payments-title for payments section sub-heading
- Replace all corresponding inline styles in index.html with these classes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: nusratneela101 <112537662+nusratneela101@users.noreply.github.com>

Redesign homepage with Alibaba-style layout

- Replace hero with 3-panel layout: category sidebar, frequently searched + savings bonanza center, hot picks right panel
- Add trust/guarantee section (GlobexSky Guaranteed) after hero
- Replace products section with horizontally scrollable Top Deals cards (product-card-v2)
- Add Top Ranking section with category tabs and ranked product grid
- Replace suppliers section with Tailored Selections grid (daily picks)
- Add promotional banner (€10 off every €100) before livestream section
- Replace footer with enhanced 5-column Alibaba-style footer with app download row, payment badges, sister sites
- Add category dropdown button and search mode tabs to navbar
- Style search submit button in GlobexSky orange
- Append all new CSS to main.css (no existing styles removed)
- Add JS: initSearchTabs, initCatSidebar, initTopDealsScroll, initRankingTabs, initDealsCountdown
- All existing sections, nav controls, aria attributes, and door animation preserved

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: nusratneela101 <112537662+nusratneela101@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: implement Alibaba-style redesign of homepage frontend

- Add GS design tokens (--gs-primary, --gs-secondary, etc.) to main.css :root
- Update btn-primary, btn-register, btn-flash-sale to use --gs-primary (#FF6A00)
- Update hero background to light/orange gradient
- Update product-price-current to --gs-primary
- Update supplier-verified to --gs-success
- Update section-title with orange left-border accent
- Update site-footer to use --gs-bg-dark (#191919)
- Create assets/css/alibaba-design.css with full Alibaba-style component library:
  - Top info bar (gs-topbar)
  - Sticky header with logo, search tabs, action buttons (gs-header)
  - Category navigation bar (gs-category-nav)
  - Hero with sidebar + banner slider + sub-banners (gs-hero)
  - Trust badges section (gs-trust)
  - Flash sale with scrollable items and progress bars (gs-flash-sale)
  - Product cards with hover actions/wishlist (gs-products-grid)
  - Supplier cards (gs-suppliers-grid)
  - How it works steps (gs-steps)
  - Newsletter section (gs-newsletter)
  - 5-column footer with social/payments (gs-footer)
  - Full responsive breakpoints (1200/768/480px)
- Rewrite index.html with complete Alibaba-style layout:
  - Topbar, sticky header, category nav, hero with 3-slide auto-playing banner
  - Trust badges, flash sale with countdown timer
  - 10 frequently searched products + 5 top ranking products
  - 4 featured suppliers, how-it-works section
  - Newsletter signup, 5-column footer
  - Banner slider JS, flash countdown JS, search tab JS
  - All existing scripts preserved (door animation, cart, auth, AI widget)

build: force NDK sysroot to prevent system header inclusion

- Add CFLAGS and CPPFLAGS with -isysroot to exclude system headers
- This prevents Kivy compilation from mixing x86_64 and ARM headers
- Forces exclusive use of NDK headers during cross-compilation

commit.message:
fix: patch libtoolize to add missing LT_SYS_SYMBOL_USCORE macro

- Newer libtool versions removed the LT_SYS_SYMBOL_USCORE macro
- libffi's configure.ac still requires it
- Wrap libtoolize to inject the macro definition into m4/libtool.m4
- This allows autoreconf to find the required macro

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
v5.10.0 (#102)

* ## v5.10.0
- *Enhancement:* `TestSharedState` updated to enable request-based (isolated) state; with the corresponding `GetHttpRequestId()` method now made public.
- *Enhancement:* Added `ApiTesterBase.AddPreRunAction()`, `AddPostRunBeforeExpectationsAction()`, `AddPostRunAfterExpectationsAction()` and `AddPostRunAction()` to enable the addition of actions to be executed at different stages of the `Run`/`RunAsync` process for every underlying test. This will enable the addition of common pre/post processing logic without having to explicitly add to each test.
- *Enhancement:* `TEntryPoint` methods can now be specified as `static`.
- *Enhancement:* `ApiError` added implicit conversion from (`string?`, `string`) tuple to enable simplified usage; e.g. `AssertErrors(("field", "Bad Request"))` versus `AssertErrors(new ApiError("field", "Bad Request"))`.
- *Fixed:* Reset `MockHttpClientRequest` internal state when using any `With*` method to ensure correct behavior.

* Update src/UnitTestEx/Hosting/EntryPoint.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Eric Sibly [chullybun] <eric@thesiblys.com>

* Update src/UnitTestEx/Abstractions/TesterBase.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Eric Sibly [chullybun] <eric@thesiblys.com>

* Fix: Replace ExecutePreRunActions with ExecutePostRunActions in HttpTesterBase finally block

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/Avanade/UnitTestEx/sessions/aaa8d366-8973-4d7e-9cf4-e99050cedaf0

Co-authored-by: chullybun <12836934+chullybun@users.noreply.github.com>

* Correct comment.

---------

Signed-off-by: Eric Sibly [chullybun] <eric@thesiblys.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: UnitTestEx
repository.description: UnitTestEx provides .NET testing extensions to the most popular testing frameworks (MSTest, NUnit and Xunit) specifically to improve the testing experience with ASP.NET controller, and Azure Function, execution including underlying HttpClientFactory mocking.

commit.message:
v0.1.12: revert to v0.1.10 base + apply ha-mcp-bridge s6 pattern

Root cause of v0.1.11 failure:
addon/run.sh was mode 100644 in git. The Dockerfile RUN chmod sets the
bit at build time, but the Supervisor clones fresh on rebuild — git
restores the original 100644 mode, so s6-overlay cannot exec the script:
  s6-overlay-suexec: fatal: can only run as pid 1

Fix (mirrors ha-mcp-bridge v0.1.2 which works):
- Reverted Dockerfile/run.sh to v0.1.10 as clean base
- Applied services.d pattern (no ENTRYPOINT override)
- Changed run.sh shebang to with-contenv bashio
- git update-index --chmod=+x addon/run.sh (mode 100644 -> 100755)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
stdlib: enforce same-type constraint on Min/Max/Clamp, add edge case tests

- Min/Max now reject mixed integer/real arguments at compile time
  (spec: both arguments must be the same numeric kind)
- Clamp now rejects mixed integer/real arguments at compile time
  (spec: all three arguments must be the same numeric kind)
- Remove mixed-type coercion from runtime min_max_value and clamp_value
- Remove dead numeric_as_real helper
- Rewrite clamp_mixed_numeric_forms test to expect compile error
- Add min_real, max_real tests for real-valued arguments
- Add min/max/clamp mixed-type compile error tests
- Add conv edge case tests: IntToHex negative, HexToInt 0X prefix,
  StrToReal whitespace trimming

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

v0.1.11: fix s6-overlay Dockerfile and run.sh

- Remove ENTRYPOINT [run.sh] — overriding the base image entrypoint
  bypasses s6-overlay (PID 1): s6-overlay-suexec: fatal: can only run as pid 1
- Register service at /etc/services.d/ha-basic-addon/run
- Change run.sh shebang to with-contenv bashio so SUPERVISOR_TOKEN
  is exported from s6 container environment before Python starts
- pip -> pip3 in Dockerfile

commit.message:
feat(catalog): add CopybookVersion, CopybookDiffRecord, MqMessageContract, CopybookContractMapping entities

Add four new domain entities to the LegacyAssets bounded context:
- CopybookVersion: tracks versioned content of COBOL copybooks
- CopybookDiffRecord: persists semantic diff results between copybook versions
- MqMessageContract: models IBM MQ message contracts with payload descriptors
- CopybookContractMapping: cross-references copybooks to OpenAPI/AsyncAPI contracts

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: dlimadev <133047117+dlimadev@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(catalog): implement CopybookParser, parsed models and diff calculator (WAVE-04 W4-S01, W4-S02)

Add COBOL copybook parsing and semantic diff capabilities to the Catalog
domain LegacyAssets bounded context:

- CopybookParsedField: record for parsed COBOL fields (level, PIC, offset, length, type)
- CopybookParsedLayout: record for complete parsed copybook layout
- CopybookParser: static domain service parsing COBOL text into structured fields
  - Supports PIC clauses (X, A, 9, S, V), COMP/COMP-3/BINARY usage
  - Handles groups, OCCURS, REDEFINES, 88-level conditions
  - Robust free-form and fixed-format COBOL column handling
- CopybookDiffCalculator: semantic diff between two copybook layouts
  - Detects field additions, removals, type/length/OCCURS changes
  - Classifies changes as Breaking, Additive, or NonBreaking
- CopybookDiffAdapter: bridges CopybookDiffCalculator to ContractDiffCalculator pipeline
- ContractDiffCalculator: routes ContractProtocol.Copybook to new adapter

Tests: 32 new tests (parser: 19, diff: 10, adapter: 3) -- all passing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: dlimadev <133047117+dlimadev@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(wave-03): add domain events, correlation engine, and auto-incident handlers for legacy telemetry

- Add 3 domain events (LegacyBatchEventIngestedEvent, LegacyMqEventIngestedEvent,
  LegacyMainframeEventIngestedEvent) in Integrations.Domain
- Add CorrelationResult record for catalog asset matching
- Update IngestBatchEvents, IngestMqEvents, IngestMainframeEvents handlers to
  publish domain events only for critical/error severity or failure conditions
- Create ILegacyEventCorrelator interface in OperationalIntelligence.Application
- Implement LegacyEventCorrelator using ISender cross-module queries to Catalog
- Add CorrelateBatchEvent, CorrelateMqEvent, CorrelateMainframeEvent handlers
- Add AutoCreateIncidentFromBatchFailure and AutoCreateIncidentFromMqAnomaly
  handlers that auto-create incidents via CreateIncident command
- Register LegacyEventCorrelator in Incidents DI
- Add cross-module project references (OI.App -> Integrations.Domain,
  OI.Infra -> Catalog.Application)

commit.message:
fix: interest filter, in-app browser, reel video orientation

Interest filter bug (Piano showing 'No content'):
- Root cause: Supabase loader used feed_content view with LIMIT 100
  on joined rows — missed most interest tags for content items
- Fix: Separate queries for content_items (LIMIT 200) and content_tags,
  then join client-side. All 5 interests now resolve correctly.

In-app content viewing:
- Replaced Linking.openURL() with WebBrowser.openBrowserAsync()
- Content opens inside the app (Chrome Custom Tab on Android)
- Applied to: PostCard, ReelPlayer Open button, Explore cards

Reel video orientation:
- YouTube videos now centered vertically with blurred thumbnail
  background behind them (Instagram-style)
- Dark overlay on blur for readability
- Non-YouTube reels show 'Open' button to view in-app browser

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
